events.title: Wednesday Kirtan: Songs of Love with Akari Tamura & Friends
events.description: Each alternate Wednesday, Akari Tamura gathers musicians and voices at Dragon Tea Temple for a devotional kirtan journey. The 'Songs of Love' series draws on Sanskrit, bhajans, and world-music traditions — a community practice in presence and harmonic resonance, held inside one of Ubud's most atmospheric ceremony spaces. Biweekly Wednesdays; upcoming dates: 23 Jul, 6 Aug, 20 Aug, 3 Sep, 17 Sep.
events.short_description: Biweekly devotional kirtan at Dragon Tea Temple with Akari Tamura — Sanskrit, bhajans, and world-music traditions.
events.venue_address: Jl. Penestanan No.8, Sayan, Ubud, Bali

events.title: The Art of Sound Healing with Agustian Supriatna
events.description: Agustian Supriatna — Ubud-rooted healer and BaliSpirit Festival presenter known as Mantraman — delivers an evening of world-medicine music at Yoga Barn. The programme weaves Sanskrit mantras, Sufi chanting, and Javanese and Sundanese lullabies through a live ensemble of bansuri, tabla, gambus, ngoni, and Tibetan singing bowls. A cross-traditional sound healing that spans multiple lineages in a single sitting.
events.short_description: Multi-tradition sound ceremony at Yoga Barn — Sufi chanting, Sanskrit mantras, and rare traditional instruments with Agustian Supriatna.

events.title: Snow Raven: Arctic Beats
events.description: Snow Raven — Siberian-Yakut vocalist, Esalen Institute faculty, and Shambhala Music Festival presenter — brings her Arctic Beats ceremony to Zest Ubud. The evening moves through Sakha shamanic vocal technique (the ancient language of birds and animals), khomus overtone playing, live looping, deep bass, guided breathwork, and embodiment movement. An NPR-featured artist whose work sits at the intersection of ancestral sound, contemporary electronic production, and ceremonial breathwork. One of the most distinctively sourced performers to visit Ubud in recent memory. Doors 18:30, ceremony 19:00.
events.short_description: Siberian-Yakut vocalist Snow Raven — Esalen faculty, Shambhala Festival — performs Arctic Beats at Zest Ubud: khomus, live looping, breathwork, and shamanic movement.
events.venue_address: Jl. Raya Penestanan Kelod 8, Ubud, Bali
